name: Spaghetti Architect
description: A by-construction-labelled, contamination-resistant, multi-language code dataset generator. An anti-optimization transpiler maps a clean JSON intermediate representation to deliberately redundant, fully-flattened, yet provably-correct code in Python, JavaScript, Go, Java, and C++, with every target compiled, run, and checked against a reference oracle. It labels each instance along two orthogonal difficulty axes -- intrinsic complexity (problem size) and incidental complexity (presentation mess at fixed semantics) -- and ships a public dev split plus a private held-out test split for contamination-controlled LLM evaluation, training/probing of code models, and robustness studies.
